item.title: Version 8.0.0
item.description: • New Spotlight squircle shape. • Dim the background when using Cursor Zoom. • New keyboard shortcuts for changing size, zoom level, etc., for Highlight, Spotlight, and Zoom features. • Fully customizable keyboard shortcuts for all annotation operations. • You can now set a default folder to save screenshots in. • Improved user experience for Interactive Mode. • New Highlight pulsing animation shown only on clicks. • New keyboard shortcut to set the line weight to a specific value. • New onboarding flow. • You can now zoom the entire screen instead of where your cursor is. • Improved annotation selection and move experience. • Fix lag in Zoom
